name: Talkwalker
description: Talkwalker is a social media analytics and listening platform that provides REST APIs for tracking brand mentions, analyzing sentiment, measuring campaign performance, and monitoring competitors across 150 million websites and 10+ social networks.

itemListElement.name: Talkwalker Search API
itemListElement.description: Search and export a subset of documents from a Talkwalker project, including brand mentions and social data across supported channels.

itemListElement.name: Talkwalker Streaming API
itemListElement.description: Real-time streaming API (v3) for monitoring keyword-based streams and project or topic-level data feeds.

itemListElement.name: Talkwalker Histogram API
itemListElement.description: Reproduce Talkwalker dashboard widgets programmatically by fetching histogram data.

itemListElement.name: Talkwalker Resources API
itemListElement.description: Manage and retrieve project resources including topics, filters, pages, events, panels, and datasets.

itemListElement.name: Talkwalker Document API
itemListElement.description: Import custom documents and modify existing documents within Talkwalker projects.

itemListElement.name: Talkwalker Image API
itemListElement.description: Detect features and entities within images using Talkwalker's image detection capabilities, enabling logo detection and visual content analytics.
